lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਉ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur poochhau jaae naam dhiaaeisaa jeeo |
lines.english: I shall go and ask the True Guru, and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਸਾਚੁ ਚਵਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam dhiaaee saach chavaaee guramukh saach pachhaanaa |
lines.english: I meditate on the True Name, chant the True Name, and as Gurmukh, I realize the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਰ ਧੁਰਹੁ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: karanee kaar dhurahu furamaaee aap muaa man maaree |
lines.english: The Primal Lord has ordained the tasks to be done; self-conceit is overcome, and the mind is subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: deenaa naath deaal niranjan anadin naam vakhaanaa |
lines.english: Night and day, I chant the Name of the merciful, immaculate Lord, the Master of the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree chhant mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Chhant, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam mahaa ras meetthaa trisanaa naam nivaaree |5|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam is the sweetest essence; through the Naam, thirst and desire are stilled. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਮਿਟਈ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਕਿਆ ਜਾਣਾ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: lekh na mittee purab kamaaeaa kiaa jaanaa kiaa hosee |
lines.english: This inscription of past deeds cannot be erased; what do I know about what will happen?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਅੜਾ ਲੇਖੁ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: masatak likhiarraa lekh purab kamaaeaa jeeo |
lines.english: Your destiny is written on your forehead, according to your past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੂਠੜੀਏ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir sang moottharree khabar na paaeea jeeo |
lines.english: Your Husband Lord is with you, O deluded soul-bride, but you do are not aware of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣੀ ਅਚਾਰਿ ਨਹੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਬਹਿ ਬਹਿ ਰੋਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: gunee achaar nahee rang raatee avagun beh beh rosee |
lines.english: You have not adopted a virtuous lifestyle, and you are not attuned to the Lord's Love; you sit there, crying over your past misdeeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਆਕ ਕੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਬਿਰਧਿ ਭਏ ਦਿਨ ਪੁੰਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan joban aak kee chhaaeaa biradh bhe din puniaa |
lines.english: Wealth and youth are like the shade of the bitter swallow-wort plant; you are growing old, and your days are coming to their end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਦੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਛੂਟੀ ਝੂਠਿ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam binaa dohaagan chhoottee jhootth vichhuniaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, you shall end up as a discarded, divorced bride; your own falsehood shall separate you from the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡੀ ਘਰੁ ਘਾਲਿਓ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਚਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: booddee ghar ghaalio gur kai bhaae chalo |
lines.english: You have drowned, and your house is ruined; walk in the Way of the Guru's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਮਹਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa naam dhiaae paaveh sukh mahalo |
lines.english: Meditate on the True Name, and you shall find peace in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaae taa sukh paae peeearrai din chaare |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord's Name, and you shall find peace; your stay in this world shall last only four days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਬਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਏ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar jaae bahai sach paae anadin naal piaare |
lines.english: Sit in the home of your own being, and you shall find Truth; night and day, be with your Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਸੁਣਿਅਹੁ ਲੋਕ ਸਬਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: vin bhagatee ghar vaas na hovee suniahu lok sabaae |
lines.english: Without loving devotion, you cannot dwell in your own home - listen, everyone!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਸੀ ਤਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਏ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sarasee taa pir paae raatee saachai naae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, she is happy, and she obtains her Husband Lord, if she is attuned to the True Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rang preetam raatee gur kai sabad veechaaree jeeo |
lines.english: Imbued with the love of her Beloved, she contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਧਨ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir dhan bhaavai taa pir bhaavai naaree jeeo |
lines.english: If the soul-bride is pleasing to her Husband Lord, then the Husband Lord will love His bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਨਾਹ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad veechaaree naah piaaree niv niv bhagat kareee |
lines.english: She contemplates the Guru's Shabads, and her Husband Lord loves her; in deep humility, she worships Him in loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਜਲਾਏ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਰੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu jalaae preetam ras meh rang kareee |
lines.english: She burns away her emotional attachment to Maya, and in love, she loves her Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਿ ਵਸੀ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਪਿਰ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saach vasee sohaagan pir siau preet piaaree |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the happy soul-bride abides in Truth; she loves to love her Husband Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗੇਤੀ ਲਾਲ ਭਈ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: prabh saache setee rang rangetee laal bhee man maaree |
lines.english: She is imbued and drenched with the Love of the True Lord; she has become beautiful, by conquering her mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਨਾਰਿ ਜੇ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਵਏ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir ghar sohai naar je pir bhaave jeeo |
lines.english: The soul-bride looks so beautiful in the home of her Husband Lord, if she is pleasing to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੇ ਵੈਣ ਚਵੇ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਏ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthe vain chave kaam na aave jeeo |
lines.english: It is of no use at all to speak false words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੁ ਅਲਾਵੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਨੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jhootth alaavai kaam na aavai naa pir dekhai nainee |
lines.english: If she speaks false, it is of no use to her, and she does not see her Husband Lord with her eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗੁਣਿਆਰੀ ਕੰਤਿ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ਛੂਟੀ ਵਿਧਣ ਰੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: avaguniaaree kant visaaree chhoottee vidhan rainee |
lines.english: Worthless, forgotten and abandoned by her Husband Lord, she passes her life-night without her Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਮਾਨੈ ਫਾਹੀ ਫਾਥੀ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabad na maanai faahee faathee saa dhan mehal na paae |
lines.english: Such a wife does not believe in the Word of the Guru's Shabad; she is caught in the net of the world, and does not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aape aap pachhaanai guramukh sehaj samaae |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, if she understands her own self, then, as Gurmukh, she merges in celestial peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਣਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa koorriaar koorr kamaaniaa jeeo |
lines.english: Without the Naam, she is false, and her actions are false as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਰਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan sohaagan naar jin pir jaaniaa jeeo |
lines.english: Blessed is that soul-bride, who knows her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਲੀਆਲਾ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਬਾਲਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir raleeaalaa joban baalaa tis raave rang raatee |
lines.english: My Husband Lord is playful and innocent; imbued with His Love, I enjoy Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਵੀ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagat suhaavee saache bhaavee bhaae bhagat prabh raatee |
lines.english: Devotional worship of the Lord is beautiful; the True Lord loves it. So immerse yourself in loving devotional worship of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਿਗਾਸੀ ਸਹੁ ਰਾਵਾਸੀ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਣਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad vigaasee sahu raavaasee fal paaeaa gunakaaree |
lines.english: She blossoms forth through the Word of the Guru's Shabad; she ravishes her Husband Lord, and obtains the most noble reward.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪਿਰ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਨਾਰੀ ॥੫॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saach milai vaddiaaee pir ghar sohai naaree |5|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, in Truth, she obtains glory; in her Husband's home, the soul-bride looks beautiful. ||5||3||
